descriptions: Level numbers are completely different
Level path numbers differ (progress state mismatch)
The active/target level and associated road levels do not match the reference.
Coin badge in reference is centered/larger with more padding compared to smaller top-left aligned badge in ours
The tilt and marble configuration on the preview board is completely different, indicating a different level state or randomized setup.
Ball positions on game board are completely different
Game board size and grid layout differ - reference shows 5x5 grid, ours shows 4x4 grid

The game board state (positions of the colored marbles, empty sockets, launchers, and active launcher colors) is completely different, indicating a mismatch in the level configuration or state rendering.
Coin count value different
Coin count value differs significantly
The coin/point values on the UI elements do not match.
HINT button text styling differs
The 'HINT' text styling on the button in the bottom right corner uses a different font, size, and layout.
Settings panel positioned higher
Overall content is shifted/zoomed in, cropping the top close button and pushing content down, causing extra vertical gap between header and Music toggle
The entire settings dialog is pushed upwards, cropping the 'SETTINGS' header and the blue 'X' close button off the top edge of the screen.
Level indicator button present at bottom
Extra background panel/box and 'LEVEL 5' banner appear behind and below the settings card that are not present in reference
Background shows game elements
Elements from the main game board (brown wooden tiles and a green 'LEVEL 5' button) are partially visible behind and below the dialogue container.
Settings panel appears smaller
Overall settings card appears larger/zoomed compared to reference, causing elements to be cropped and enlarged
Coin counter at top
Top-right coin counter with '75' balance is missing
The top-right blue coin counter displaying '75' is missing in our version.
Hearts/lives indicator at top left
Extra UI elements not present in reference (hearts bar, settings gear, hint button, coin counter at bottom)
Overall vertical layout is compressed/shifted, wooden background and card sizing differ, elements pushed closer to edges
Background HUD elements from the game screen (hearts bar, settings gear, hint button, and bottom coin counter) are showing through behind and around the modal overlay in our version.
Next button text styling
Text color for 'REWARD' and '+25' differs
The font weight and outlines for 'REWARD' and '+25' are heavier/thicker, and the 'Next' button text is in all caps and a different font.
Green background behind banner
Wooden shelf background barely visible/cropped in ours
Crown icon size and card proportions slightly different
The green 'COMPLETED' ribbon banner at the top of the modal is stretched horizontally and clipped awkwardly at the sides.
Different emoji expression
Emoji used differs
The sad/crying face emoji/graphic is completely different.
Green button text differs
Green button label differs
Green button text has different copy.
Top navigation bar with settings button added
Extra UI elements not present in reference: hearts bar, settings gear icon at top, and coin counters with 'continue' bar at bottom
Message text casing differs
The spacing and line height of the 'No hearts left! Watch an ad to continue.' text block is larger and wider.
Overall content is zoomed in / larger, causing top and bottom elements to be cut off and overflow screen bounds
The entire failed pop-up modal is vertically shifted upwards and clipped at the top, and background UI elements leak from behind.

verdict.summary: FAIL — panel median 65% · 0 pass, 5 fail, 1 unscored (floor 85%)
